notes: Departments are now a managed list you pick from a dropdown in Add Employee (with an add/edit/delete manager). Employee KYC documents (Aadhaar, PAN, degree, bank proof — JPG/PNG/PDF) can be uploaded, previewed with zoom, verified and deleted. Employees are now deactivated instead of deleted (history + documents kept), and inactive employees are hidden unless you enable 'Show inactive employees' in Settings.
